strengths: 15+ years across full-stack web, with current TypeScript/Node.js and React experience
Active AI-agent infrastructure work including MCP code generators at re:cinq
Strong engineering practices: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, testing workshops
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience listed in resume
Limited evidence of Kotlin; Java exposure is older (robotic arms, NI era)
Cloud platform experience narrow — AWS CDK mentioned, but no GCP/Azure or Kubernetes depth beyond GISCollective

key_factors.factor: AI agent and MCP tooling experience

response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned full-stack engineer with well over the required 6 years, current hands-on TypeScript/Node.js/React work, and directly relevant AI-agent infrastructure experience via MCP tooling. Engineering-craft signals (TDD, CI/CD, open-source projects, teaching) are strong. Gaps are around the specific secondary stack — no Nest.js mention, limited recent Kotlin/Java, and modest cloud breadth — which would need to be probed but are reasonably learnable given the demonstrated polyglot history.
